name: Maria Bascombe
headline: From hobby sketches to working graphic designer
quote: CAP gave me the foundation I needed. Six months after finishing the drawing course, I was freelancing for local businesses.
summary: Maria joined CAP at 19 with a notebook full of sketches and no formal training. Two years later she runs her own studio in Bridgetown.

name: Devon Springer
headline: Two years that changed everything
quote: I came in not sure what to do with my life. I left with a trade, a network, and discipline I never had before.
summary: Devon completed the residential year and apprenticed with a marine engineering firm. He's now a junior technician.

name: Akeem Holder
headline: Idea to incorporated in nine months
quote: The YES officers walked me through everything — registration, costing, even my first pitch.
summary: Akeem launched a sustainable packaging startup with mentorship and seed funding facilitated through YES.

name: Shanice Cumberbatch
headline: First job, first paycheck
quote: I'd been out of school a year and applying everywhere. Pathways got me an attachment that turned into a permanent role.
summary: Shanice was placed at a hospitality firm and converted to full-time within four months.
